command_module_rewrites.reason: The BugsInPy command passes one pytest node directly; the adapter preserves that bounded node while avoiding tox environment fan-out.

preparation_files.reason: Restore the 2016 test suite's pre-PYTEST_CURRENT_TEST environment semantics while retaining the benchmark-pinned pytest 3.10.1 runner.

preparation_files.content:
Metadata-Version: 2.1
Name: thefuck
Version: 3.4
Summary: Magnificent app which corrects your previous console command
Home-page: https://github.com/nvbn/thefuck
Author: Vladimir Iakovlev
Author-email: nvbn.rm@gmail.com
License: MIT
Requires-Dist: psutil
Requires-Dist: colorama
Requires-Dist: six
Requires-Dist: decorator
preparation_files.reason: Replace the benchmark's editable VCS install with static distribution metadata without executing repository setup.py.

preparation_files.content:
[console_scripts]
thefuck = thefuck.main:main
thefuck-alias = thefuck.main:print_alias
fuck = thefuck.main:how_to_configure_alias
preparation_files.reason: Reproduce the three console entry points declared by the audited setup.py without installing or executing repository code.
